filters.label: Test
filters.optionsSql: SELECT DISTINCT code_text FROM service_requests WHERE code_text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY code_text

query.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM service_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT subject_ref) AS value FROM service_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM observations
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(effective_date_time,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(effective_date_time,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0
  THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('final','amended') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*))
  ELSE 100 END AS value
FROM observations

SELECT code_text AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM service_requests
WHERE code_text IS NOT NULL
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
GROUP BY code_text
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT substring(authored_on,1,10) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM service_requests
WHERE authored_on >= to_char(now() - interval '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
GROUP BY substring(authored_on,1,10)
ORDER BY label

SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM service_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT priority AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM service_requests
WHERE priority IS NOT NULL
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]
GROUP BY priority
ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT 'Ordered' AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM service_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'Specimen Received', COUNT(*) FROM specimens WHERE received_time IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Result Recorded', COUNT(*) FROM observations
UNION ALL SELECT 'Report Issued', COUNT(*) FROM diagnostic_reports WHERE issued IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM observations
WHERE interpretation_code IN ('H','HH','L','LL','A','AA')
[[AND substring(effective_date_time,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(effective_date_time,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]

SELECT substring(effective_date_time,1,10) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM observations
WHERE effective_date_time >= to_char(now() - interval '30 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]
GROUP BY substring(effective_date_time,1,10)
ORDER BY label

SELECT code_text AS label, COUNT(*) AS x, ROUND(AVG(value_quantity)::numeric, 2) AS y
FROM observations
WHERE value_quantity IS NOT NULL AND code_text IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY code_text
ORDER BY x DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT identifier_value AS order_id, code_text AS test, status, priority, substring(authored_on,1,10) AS authored
FROM service_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_on,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND code_text = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
ORDER BY authored_on DESC
LIMIT 50
